raw.advertiser_name: Promise Pets by Build-A-Bear: A Virtual Pet Game
raw.message: It’s time to celebrate the Class of 2026! 🎓 Furry friends make thoughtful surprises and cuddly keepsakes – and our online Graduation Giftshop makes it easy to send celebratory hugs their way!

hook.summary: Close-up of a graduation teddy bear followed by seniors entering a room.
hook.visual_action: A teddy bear in a graduation gown is shown, then cuts to students walking through a doorway.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I hope that the kids that are graduating follow their dreams.

scene_flow: High school seniors enter a room and are surprised by their former elementary teachers.
Seniors react with joy and hug their former teachers while receiving bears.
Montage of different graduation plushies including a frog, bear, and bunny.
Final brand card with logo and website.
on_screen_text: These graduating seniors are being surprised by their former elementary teachers.
audience_proxy: Parents and family members of graduating students looking for a sentimental gift.
